commit.message:
fix(ci): make yaml import type-check environment-independent

Move the optional pyyaml import suppression from an inline type:ignore to a
per-module mypy override. The inline ignore was flagged as unused under strict
mode when --ignore-missing-imports already suppressed the missing import (CI),
while removing it broke type-check when pyyaml is installed without stubs. The
override yields identical results regardless of whether pyyaml is present.
docs: use % instead of pp in key results

docs: update README facts, citation, and bundled PDF to accepted v3

Use the accepted paper title, correct human-correlation gain to +0.15
(Table 1), bump citation to 2026 with arXiv eprint 2603.21362, and replace
the bundled PDF with the accepted v3 version.

fix: align num_dimensions=5 and recency_decay=0.5 defaults with paper; retry 5xx

Match the accepted paper defaults (N=5, lambda=0.5) across config, pipeline
fallback, and generator signatures. Complete the OpenAI client 5xx-retry path
so APIStatusError with 500/502/503/504 is retried while 4xx propagates.
Update README.md

commit.message:
docs: update README with paper results and PDF link; clean up examples

- Add paper section with key results (r=0.79, α=0.83, DPO +6.8–8.5 pp)
- Add PDF link pointing to assets/adarubrics.pdf
- Update tagline and Quick Start example (Tokyo weather, matches quickstart.py)
- Update citation to @article with official paper title
- Add assets/adarubrics.pdf
- Remove B2B domain framing from supply_chain_eval.py docstring and domain field

fix(ci): mypy ndarray typing for strict checks; harden workflow pip

- Use numpy.typing.NDArray[Any] in krippendorffs_alpha (fixes type-arg on Py3.10 CI matrix).\n- Upgrade pip before install in Actions; ignore .ci-venv-* for local matrix tests.
chore: add scripts/ci.sh to mirror GitHub Actions locally
fix(ci): satisfy ruff check and format for GitHub Actions
chore: add uv.lock for reproducible dependency resolution

feat: max_tokens wiring, vLLM retries, pipeline and evaluator hardening

Shared json_extract; OpenAI retries honor max_retries; PercentileFilter and DimensionAware fixes; step eval dedupe; config to_json strips api_key; reliability max_tokens; 94 tests passing.
Update README.md

commit.message: docs: remove PyPI badge until package is published
docs: add CI/PyPI/Python/license badges in AgentHER style

fix: resolve bugs and harden quality across the codebase

Bug fixes:
- vllm_client: add JSON instruction fallback when last message isn't role=user
- vllm_client: apply _extract_json parsing when use_guided_decoding=False
- vllm_client: wrap _chat exceptions as LLMClientError for consistent error handling
- reliability: correct Krippendorff's alpha D_e formula (was Var, should be 2N/(N-1)*Var)

Performance:
- reliability: run n_runs evaluations concurrently via asyncio.gather instead of serial loop

Observability:
- DimensionAwareFilter: log a warning when a trajectory is rejected for empty dimension scores
- LLMTrajectoryEvaluator: warn when LLM-hallucinated dimension names are silently dropped
- serialization: report skip count at WARNING level in load_trajectories/load_evaluations
- DPOPairGenerator: warn when min_margin filters out all pairs instead of silently returning empty

Usability/CI:
- pyproject.toml: add yaml = ["pyyaml>=6.0"] optional dependency group
- ci.yml: add ruff format --check step to enforce consistent formatting
- Apply ruff format to the entire codebase (first-time run)
docs: add logo and AgentHER-style README header with nav links
docs: align Related projects with sibling repos
docs(README): add Related projects (AgentHER, AgentSynth, trajectory_tokenization)
docs(README): Quick Start API key note; test pipeline empty trajectories
fix(filter): DimensionAwareFilter fail when no dimension scores
refactor(generator): validate rubric via model_copy, no mutation
fix(pipeline): require non-empty trajectories, clearer config errors, run_sync doc
fix(ci): mypy - yaml import type ignore
fix(ci): mypy - dict type args and cast return in evaluator and llm
docs(README): env note and project structure (analysis, io, reward)
feat(api): export PipelineResult and ConfigurationError
refactor(config): env override via model_copy, no in-place mutation
fix(examples): ruff lint
ci: add GitHub Actions workflow, Apache-2.0 LICENSE, and py.typed marker
feat(config): support loading config from YAML/JSON files with env override
feat(analysis): add inter-rater reliability with Krippendorff's alpha
feat(io): add JSONL serialization for trajectories, evaluations, and DPO export
feat(reward): add reward scaling with linear, advantage, DPO pair generation
fix: propagate task_instruction through evaluator chain to pipeline
docs: add README, quickstart and supply chain evaluation examples
test: add 48 unit tests covering models, aggregators, filters, and pipeline
feat(pipeline): add end-to-end orchestration with layered config
feat(filter): add survival-of-the-fittest filtering with 4 strategies
feat(evaluator): add trajectory evaluator with weighted/geometric/min aggregation strategies
feat(generator): add LLM-driven dynamic rubric generation with prompt engineering
feat(llm): add async LLM client abstraction with OpenAI and vLLM backends
feat(core): add Pydantic data models, exceptions, and type system
init: project skeleton with build config and dependencies
